title: jurinea propinqua
intro: Jurinea propinqua, also known as the "sibirian fleabane", is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and Siberia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Jurinea propinqua include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate joint pain. Herbal preparations of Jurinea propinqua often include the plant's roots, leaves, and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
